assertions.description: navigator.clipboard.read is a callable function returning ClipboardItem[].
ClipboardItem.types is an array of strings (MIME types available without fetching data).
assertions.test: (()=>{const c=new ClipboardItem({'text/plain': new Blob(['x'],{type:'text/plain'})});return c.types && typeof c.types.length === 'number' && c.types[0] === 'text/plain';})()

assertions.description: ClipboardItem.getType returns a Promise<Blob> (the lazily-fetched payload).
assertions.test: (()=>{const c=new ClipboardItem({'text/plain': new Blob(['x'],{type:'text/plain'})});const p=c.getType('text/plain');return p && typeof p.then === 'function';})()

assertions.description: ClipboardItem.getType throws / rejects for a MIME type not in the available list.
navigator.clipboard.readText remains as the simple text shortcut.
navigator.permissions can query 'clipboard-read' (the permission selective reads depend on).
